title: Participant Roles Vocabulary
description: Defines the standard and custom participant roles available for events, relationships, and assertions

ParticipantRoleDefinition.description: Definition of a single participant role

label.description: Human-readable label for the participant role

description.description: Detailed description of the participant role

applies_to.description: Contexts in which this role can be used (event, relationship, or both). When present, must contain at least one value. When omitted, the role is treated as applicable to all contexts.

gedcom.description: Corresponding GEDCOM RELA value for import/export mapping
